revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template talk:AfC submission/created]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template talk:AfC submission/created]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category New automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template talk:AfC submission/created]] <noinclude></noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template talk:AfC submission/created]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 12:26, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->
